creator: vs@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Old Synopsis: gccxml fails to compile on powerpc
> New Synopsis: devel/gccxml fails to compile on powerpc

Dear Justin, sorry for letting this report fall through the cracks. I =
will see if removing the include improves things, but if not, I will =
have to mark this port as a BROKEN for now on ppc until someone comes up =
with a fix, possibly with an update to the version from Nov. 2007.

Volker
